"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const store = require("@tanstack/store"); const isServer = require("@tanstack/router-core/isServer"); function batch(fn) { if (isServer.isServer) { return fn(); } let result; store.batch(() => { result = fn(); }); return result; } exports.batch = batch; //# sourceMappingURL=batch.cjs.map
